currentObjective: Ship coordinated student rewards, kid PIN login, question reporting, and issue-processing with clean branch separation.
mergePolicy: No merge to master without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Parent dashboard PIN setup, kid session backend, rewards transfer/redeem, kid access page, shared auth safeguards
20-question learn/results UX, next-set flow, question reporting UI, landing-page kid entry, issue-processing script

coordinationRules: Read plan, ownership, both status files, and both handoff files before starting a new task.
Update status every 60 seconds while actively working.
Use handoff files to communicate risks, scope changes, and integration notes.
If a new user request arrives in either window, that agent must update this plan immediately.
